cards.title: Red Light — Stimulating Colour
cards._legacyHtml:
Wavelength: 620–750 nm. Physiological effect: Stimulates sympathetic nervous system, raises body temperature, increases RBC production, boosts circulation.
Indications: Anaemia, paralysis, hypothyroidism, chronic fatigue, depression, impotence, low BP, poor circulation, cold extremities.
Duration: 15–30 min/session. Frequency: Daily or alternate days.
Method: Red filtered light or red glass bottle solarised water (500 ml, 4–6 hrs direct sunlight).
Contraindications: Fever, acute inflammation, hypertension, epilepsy, bleeding disorders.

cards.title: Orange Light — Warming & Stimulating
cards._legacyHtml:
Wavelength: 590–620 nm. Physiological effect: Stimulates respiratory system, anti-spasmodic, increases milk production, stimulates digestive enzymes.
Indications: Asthma, bronchitis, amenorrhoea, menstrual cramps, lactation insufficiency, kidney stones, hypothyroidism, constipation, mental fatigue.
Duration: 15–20 min. Frequency: Daily.
Method: Orange filtered glass/cellophane or orange bottle solarised water.
Contraindications: Anxiety, nausea, fever, hyperthyroidism.

cards.title: Yellow Light — Nerve Tonic
cards._legacyHtml:
Wavelength: 570–590 nm. Physiological effect: Stimulates motor nerves, activates lymphatic system, aids liver and GI function, improves concentration.
Indications: Constipation, flatulence, liver disorders, diabetes, skin diseases (eczema, psoriasis), indigestion, mental dullness, arthritis.
Duration: 20–30 min. Frequency: Daily.
Method: Yellow filtered light or yellow solarised water (especially for GI use).
Contraindications: Acute fever, diarrhoea, inflammatory bowel disease, anxiety disorders.

cards.title: Green Light — Balancing & Antiseptic
cards._legacyHtml:
Wavelength: 495–570 nm. Physiological effect: Balances autonomic nervous system, antiseptic, anti-infective, calming, rebuilds muscles and cells.
Indications: Hypertension, headache, ulcers, heart conditions, neuralgia, erysipelas, influenza, syphilis, cancer (adjunct), eye strain.
Duration: 20–30 min. Frequency: Daily or alternate days.
Method: Green filtered light; green solarised water for ulcers and infections.
Contraindications: Depression, fatigue states (use cautiously — too much green can be sedating).

cards.title: Blue Light — Cooling & Sedating
cards._legacyHtml:
Wavelength: 450–495 nm. Physiological effect: Cools, sedates, anti-inflammatory, reduces fever, lowers BP, stimulates parasympathetic system, promotes melatonin (limited).
Indications: Fever, hypertension, inflammatory conditions, jaundice (neonatal), insomnia, headache, burns, itching, mania, tachycardia, sore throat.
Duration: 15–20 min. Frequency: Daily.
Method: Blue filtered light on affected area; blue solarised water for throat/GI conditions.
Contraindications: Depression, hypothyroidism, cold-sensitive patients, paralysis.

cards.title: Indigo Light — Parathyroid & Pain
cards._legacyHtml:
Wavelength: 420–450 nm. Physiological effect: Parathyroid depressant, thyroid stimulant, blood purifier, analgesic, strong sedative effect on pain centres.
Indications: Hyperthyroidism, cataracts (periorbital use), deafness, skin diseases, nosebleeds, pneumonia, convulsions, acute pain, sciatica.
Duration: 10–15 min. Frequency: Alternate days.
Method: Indigo filtered glass; compress soaked in indigo solarised water for local pain.
Contraindications: Hypothyroidism, anaemia, depression.

cards.title: Violet Light — Lymphatic & Sedative
cards._legacyHtml:
Wavelength: 380–420 nm. Physiological effect: Stimulates spleen, promotes WBC production, sedates motor nerves, reduces muscular activity, anti-tumour (experimental).
Indications: Neurological disorders, epilepsy, insomnia, bladder problems, lymphadenopathy, scalp disorders, meningitis, concussion (subacute), skin tumours (adjunct).
Duration: 10–15 min. Frequency: Alternate days — avoid overuse.
Method: Violet filtered light; violet solarised water for bladder and lymphatic conditions.
Contraindications: Depression, weakness, anaemia, low vitality states.

cards.title: Solarised Water — Preparation & Use
cards._legacyHtml:
Principle: Water energised by sunlight through coloured glass acquires the properties of that colour frequency.
Preparation: Fill 3/4 of a clean coloured glass bottle with water. Seal with cork/cloth. Place in direct sunlight for 4–8 hours. Store in cool dark place; use within 24 hours.
Dosage: 30–60 ml, 3–4 times daily before meals. Children: 15–30 ml.
Colour selection: Match to indication (e.g., yellow water for constipation, blue for fever, green for infection).
Precaution: Use only borosilicate or natural glass — never plastic. Do not solarise on cloudy days.

cards.title: LED Chromotherapy — Clinical Use
cards._legacyHtml:
Technology: LED panels emit specific wavelengths. More precise than filtered light.
Red LED (630–660 nm): Wound healing, collagen synthesis, chronic pain, hair loss (LLLT). Evidence: Level 2B.
Blue LED (415–470 nm): Acne vulgaris (P. acnes photosensitisation), neonatal jaundice. Evidence: Level 1B for acne.
Near-infrared (810–850 nm): Deep tissue healing, joint pain, neurological support.
Session parameters: 10–20 min, 20–50 J/cm2 (energy density). Maintain 5–15 cm distance.
Safety: Use UV-filtering goggles. Avoid direct eye exposure. Contraindicated in photosensitive skin disorders, on active malignancy sites.

cards.title: Chromotherapy — Clinical Indications Table
cards._legacyHtml:
Quick Reference by Condition:
Hypertension: Blue, Green
Anaemia: Red, Orange
Asthma: Orange, Blue
Constipation: Yellow, Orange
Depression: Orange, Yellow, Red
Insomnia: Blue, Violet
Arthritis (acute): Blue, Green | Arthritis (chronic): Red, Orange
Diabetes: Yellow, Green
Thyroid (hypo): Orange, Yellow | Thyroid (hyper): Indigo, Blue
Skin infections: Green, Blue
Fever: Blue
Liver disorders: Yellow, Green
Migraine: Blue, Green
Paralysis: Red, Orange
